category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Kuwait KUCAS conformity, GSO energy-efficiency labelling, and GSO/IEC safety requirements.

title.en: China-to-Kuwait Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入科威特：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入科威特：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Kuwait market-access requirements: the mandatory KUCAS conformity scheme run by PAI, GSO energy-efficiency labelling and MEPS, GSO/IEC 60335-2-24 safety, R-600a refrigerant handling, and the in-country importer obligation.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与科威特市场准入要求对照：由PAI运行的强制性KUCAS符合性评估方案、GSO能效标识及最低能效标准（MEPS）、GSO/IEC 60335-2-24安全要求、R-600a制冷剂处理及本地进口商义务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與科威特市場准入要求對照：由PAI運行的強制性KUCAS符合性評估方案、GSO能效標識及最低能效標準（MEPS）、GSO/IEC 60335-2-24安全要求、R-600a製冷劑處理及本地進口商義務。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Kuwait PAI/KUCAS requirements, GSO standards, energy-efficiency labelling and MEPS thresholds, and importer obligations with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行科威特PAI/KUCAS要求、GSO标准、能效标识及MEPS门槛值以及进口商义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行科威特PAI/KUCAS要求、GSO標準、能效標識及MEPS門檻值以及進口商義務。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers face four major Kuwait compliance gaps: (1) the mandatory KUCAS (Kuwait Conformity Assurance Scheme) run by PAI — a Technical Evaluation Report plus a per-shipment Certificate of Conformity is required, and Chinese CCC certification is not accepted as a substitute; (2) GSO energy-efficiency labelling and MEPS — the appliance must meet the GSO/Kuwait minimum energy-performance threshold and carry the GSO energy label, which is calculated differently from China's GB 12021.2 grades; (3) safety re-evaluation to GSO IEC 60335-2-24 with electrical ratings declared for the Kuwait 240 V / 50 Hz grid; and (4) appointment of an in-country (Kuwait) importer of record to clear goods at Shuwaikh/Shuaiba and hold the KUCAS file. R-600a refrigerant is well-positioned, but charge documentation against GSO/IEC 60335-2-24 must be verified.
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商面临四大科威特合规差距：（1）由PAI运行的强制性KUCAS（科威特符合性保证方案）——须提交技术评估报告并取得逐批货物的符合性证书，中国CCC认证不被接受为替代；（2）GSO能效标识及MEPS——器具须满足GSO/科威特最低能效门槛并加贴GSO能效标签，其计算方式与中国GB 12021.2能效等级不同；（3）依据GSO IEC 60335-2-24重新进行安全评估，并按科威特240 V / 50 Hz电网声明电气参数；（4）委任本地（科威特）进口记录商，以在舒维赫/舒艾巴口岸清关并保管KUCAS文件。R-600a制冷剂条件良好，但须核实充注量文件是否符合GSO/IEC 60335-2-24。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨四大科威特合規差距：（1）由PAI運行的強制性KUCAS（科威特符合性保證方案）——須提交技術評估報告並取得逐批貨物的符合性證書，中國CCC認證不被接受為替代；（2）GSO能效標識及MEPS——器具須滿足GSO/科威特最低能效門檻並加貼GSO能效標籤，其計算方式與中國GB 12021.2能效等級不同；（3）依據GSO IEC 60335-2-24重新進行安全評估，並按科威特240 V / 50 Hz電網聲明電氣參數；（4）委任本地（科威特）進口記錄商，以在舒維赫/舒艾巴口岸清關並保管KUCAS文件。R-600a製冷劑條件良好，但須核實充注量文件是否符合GSO/IEC 60335-2-24。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true. Official regulator (PAI/KUCAS, GSO), standards body, or primary legal source preferred; local PDFs not accepted.
